import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { Button } from '../components/ui/button'; import { Card } from '../components/ui/card'; import { DollarSign, Users, Zap, Shield, Clock, CreditCard, Calendar, TrendingUp, Wallet, Star, ArrowRight, Download, MapPin, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react'; import { mockData } from '../utils/mockData'; const Home = () => { const iconMap = { DollarSign, Users, Zap, Shield, Clock, CreditCard, Calendar, TrendingUp, Wallet }; const bannerItems = [ { emoji: '🚀', text: 'Launching Soon..!' }, { emoji: '👀', text: 'Stay Tuned ..!' }, { emoji: '⏳', text: 'Arriving Soon ..!' }, { emoji: '🔥', text: 'Something Big is Coming..!' }, { emoji: '🚖', text: 'Rolling Soon ..!' }, ]; return (
{/* Scrolling Banner Section */}
{[...bannerItems, ...bannerItems].map((item, index) => (
{item.emoji} {item.text}
))}
{/* Hero Section */}
{/* Background Image with Overlay */}
{/* Content */}

Reliable Local Rides When You Need Them

Safe, fast, and affordable rides in your city. Your trusted transportation partner across Canada.

{/* How It Works Section */}

How It Works

Get a ride in three simple steps

{mockData.howItWorks.map((step, index) => (
{step.step}

{step.title}

{step.description}

 {index < mockData.howItWorks.length - 1 && (
)}
))}
{/* Why Choose Us Section */}

Why Choose Falcon Ride?

Experience the difference with our premium service

{mockData.features.map((feature) => { const Icon = iconMap[feature.icon]; return (

{feature.title}

{feature.description}

 ); })}
{/* Driver Opportunity Section */}
{/* Background Pattern */}

Drive With Us and Earn More

Join our growing community of drivers and start earning on your own schedule.

{mockData.driverBenefits.map((benefit) => { const Icon = iconMap[benefit.icon]; return (

{benefit.title}

{benefit.description}

); })}
{/* Testimonials Section */}

What Our Users Say

Real reviews from real people

{mockData.testimonials.map((testimonial) => (
{[...Array(testimonial.rating)].map((_, i) => ( ))}

"{testimonial.comment}"

{testimonial.name}

{testimonial.role}

 ))}
{/* Cities We Serve Section */}

Cities We Serve

Available in major cities across Canada

{mockData.cities.map((city, index) => (

{city}

 ))}
{/* Download App Section */}

Download Falcon Ride App

Get started today and experience seamless transportation at your fingertips

); }; export default Home;
